name: writhing_stalker.live_campfire_counterplay_mcw
description: Live light/campfire-equivalent counterplay row: noon bright/focused footing makes the stalker withdraw/cool instead of striking.

steps.label: post_load_campfire_counterplay_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: noon light/focus fixture loads to live map

steps.label: audit_saved_noon_before_campfire_counterplay
steps.abort_reason: installed save did not prove expected time before live writhing-stalker window
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved turn proves local noon/bright counterplay footing

steps.label: audit_saved_writhing_stalker_before_campfire_counterplay
steps.abort_reason: saved active_monsters metadata did not contain required live-scenario footing
steps.expected_visible_fact: one hostile stalker starts seven tiles east at plausible visible distance

steps.label: toggle_safe_mode_off_before_campfire_counterplay
steps.expected_visible_fact: safe mode is toggled off so the bounded live turn window is not consumed by warnings

steps.label: advance_campfire_counterplay_window
steps.expected_visible_fact: bounded live turn window runs under bright/focused counterplay

steps.label: audit_writhing_stalker_campfire_counterplay_live_plan
steps.abort_reason: same-run artifact lacked bright/focused withdrawal line
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run debug artifact proves light/focus withdrawal

steps.label: audit_writhing_stalker_campfire_counterplay_no_strike
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run debug artifact does not contain forbidden magic-target or strike lines

evidence_contract.claim: bright/focused player counterplay causes live withdraw/cooling behavior and no strike
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for writhing-stalker live fun behavior
evidence_contract.writeback_note: No save/writeback gate: these scenarios prove bounded live-plan behavior from current-run logs plus saved start-state footing; persistent map mutation is not part of the product claim.
